# Selection Guide

Use this file when the user has not named a specific effect id.

## Fast Rules

- If the user names an effect id, use that exact spec.
- If the motion needs to respect line or word layout, prefer a layout-aware spec instead of a generic stagger.
- If the request is about state replacement rather than first-load reveal, pay close attention to the `swap` block.

## Effect Families

### Per-character emphasis

- `soft-blur-in`
- `per-character-rise`
- `typewriter`
- `bottom-up-letters`
- `top-down-letters`

### Per-word phrasing

- `per-word-crossfade`
- `spring-scale-in`
- `shared-axis-y`
- `blur-out-up`
- `kinetic-center-build`
- `short-slide-right`
- `short-slide-down`

### Per-line editorial reveals

- `mask-reveal-up`
- `line-by-line-slide`

### Whole-phrase state transitions

- `micro-scale-fade`
- `shimmer-sweep`
- `fade-through`
- `shared-axis-z`
- `scale-down-fade`
- `focus-blur-resolve`

### Layout-aware choreography

- `kinetic-center-build`
- `short-slide-right`
- `short-slide-down`

### Additional bundled patterns not on the website

- `depth-parallax-words`
- `shared-axis-x`
- `stagger-from-center`
- `stagger-from-edges`
